name_cn:
Top quality factory, complete packaging
5-Grid Milk Tea Color in stock!!️
Lady's latest quilted sheepskin 5-grid, classic upgrade📤, improved the scratchy zipper design, really thoughtful 😘, after being hurt by various zipper bags, really love the new 5-grid flap design, full capacity 💯, looks good handheld or crossbody, retro quilt and timeless shape, a classic every girl should own 👜
size:24cm
